description: Annual overhaul inspection of P-101B multistage boiler feed water pump
findings: Pump internals in good order. Wear ring clearances within OEM limits. Coupling alignment corrected to 0.04 mm. Bearing temperature at TE-101B steady 63 degC on restart.
parts_used: Coupling element kit CPL-4460; gasket set GSK-101B

description: PDI-S14 reading 0.34 bar - strainer basket cleaning requested by shift operations
findings: Basket removed and cleaned. Light mill scale and pipe debris. PDI-S14 returned to 0.20 bar clean condition after refit.

description: Operations report bearing high temperature complaint on P-101B - TE-101B touching 82 degC on afternoon shift
findings: Oil level low in outboard bearing housing. Topped up with ISO VG 46 turbine oil. TE-101B settled to 68 degC. Noted pump had been running near minimum flow for extended period during low steam demand.

description: Routine stroke test and calibration of MOV-118 minimum-flow recirculation valve
findings: Valve stroked full travel 0-100 percent. Positioner recalibrated. Slight stiction noted on opening below 20 percent but within acceptance. Recommend monitoring.

description: Elevated vibration investigation on P-101B - VE-101B trending 4.6 mm/s RMS against 4.5 alarm
findings: Spectral analysis shows raised 1x running speed and broadband energy 0.4-0.6x indicative of recirculation. Discharge flow logged at 96 m3h against 240 m3h rated. Advised operations to maintain flow above the 72 m3h minimum continuous flow. Vibration fell to 2.9 mm/s once flow restored.

description: Suction strainer S-14 differential pressure rising - PDI-S14 at 0.41 bar
findings: Basket cleaned and inspected. Corrosion product and weld spatter recovered. No basket damage. PDI-S14 0.21 bar after refit.

description: Repeat bearing high-temperature complaint on P-101B - TE-101B reaching 84 degC sustained
findings: Outboard bearing inspected in situ. Minor discolouration of cage. Bearing replaced as precaution. Root cause attributed to sustained low-flow operation during turndown - MOV-118 observed not opening fully to admit recirculation.
parts_used: Angular contact bearing 7314 BECBM x2; oil seal OS-95-120-12

description: BREAKDOWN - P-101B mechanical seal failure with heavy leakage from seal chamber and simultaneous outboard bearing distress. Pump tripped on high vibration.
findings: Mechanical seal faces badly heat checked and carbon face cracked. Outboard bearing raceway spalled. Root cause confirmed as prolonged low-flow operation: DCS trend review shows P-101B ran between 55 and 70 m3h for 11 days continuously against the 72 m3h minimum continuous flow (30 percent of 240 m3h BEP). MOV-118 recirculation valve found partially seized at 22 percent and did not provide required minimum flow. Internal recirculation drove seal chamber temperature up and destroyed the seal faces; bearing failed secondary to shaft vibration.
parts_used: Cartridge mechanical seal JC-70-BFP; angular contact bearing 7314 BECBM x2; shaft sleeve SS-101B-04; O-ring kit ORK-101B

description: MOV-118 minimum-flow recirculation valve seized - overhaul required following P-101B seal failure investigation
findings: Valve dismantled. Plug and cage heavily scored with hard deposit build-up. Stem packing over-tightened. Trim replaced and packing renewed. Full stroke restored 0-100 percent with no stiction on bench and in service test.
parts_used: Fisher ET trim set 4in Class 600; graphite packing set PK-657; stem SS-118

description: Scheduled 3-yearly overhaul and condition assessment of P-101B
findings: Rotor withdrawn and inspected. No abnormal wear. Seal faces from 2023 rebuild in excellent condition. Balance check within ISO 1940 G2.5. Baseline vibration recorded at 2.1 mm/s RMS and TE-101B baseline 62 degC.
parts_used: Gasket set GSK-101B; wear ring set WR-101B; seal flush filter element

description: Planned cleaning of suction strainer S-14 on P-101B suction line
findings: Basket cleaned. Moderate silt loading consistent with recent deaerator make-up water quality excursion. PDI-S14 0.19 bar clean.

description: Operations report P-101B running noisy with bearing temperature climbing - TE-101B 79 degC and rising over the week
findings: Walkdown carried out. Audible crackling at suction consistent with cavitation. PDI-S14 measured 0.47 bar approaching the 0.5 bar alarm. FT-101 flow reduced to 118 m3h. MOV-118 position frozen at 34 percent and not responding to controller demand. Advised urgent strainer clean and MOV-118 intervention before flow falls below the 72 m3h minimum continuous flow. Job left open pending shutdown window.
